name: get_dashboards
short_description: Get list of Project summary dashboards
full_help:
get_dashboards

Description: 
Get list of Project summary dashboards

Syntax: 
get_dashboards  [-quiet] [-verbose] [<patterns>...]

Usage: 
  Name          Description
  -------------------------
  [-quiet]      Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]    Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<patterns>]  Match gadget names against patterns
                Default: *
                Values: The default search pattern is the wildcard *

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
